name: Shaurya Garg
tagline: Computer Engineering student & developer — Patiala, India
about: I'm a Computer Engineering student at Thapar Institute focused on AI/ML and backend systems. I've interned building voice-agent and scraping frameworks at Credlix and a RAG chatbot at Moglix, and built LLM-driven simulation platforms, a multi-agent RL system for energy optimization, and a voice-activated recognition robot.
whatIDo: Backend development with FastAPI, Django & PostgreSQL
AI/ML — RAG systems, LLM orchestration (Gemini/LangChain), reinforcement learning
Full-stack apps with Next.js, Node.js & Streamlit
Optimization & simulation with OR-Tools and genetic algorithms
